pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Sony WH-1000XM5 is real product with model number WH-1000XM5
Web search shows Sony WH-1000XM5 MSRP is $399; target price of $329.99 is realistic discounted price consistent with 2026 market pricing ($248-$350 range observed)
Web search confirmed Logitech MX Master 3S is real product; MXM3S is valid SKU abbreviation
Web search shows Logitech MX Master 3S has standard pricing of $99.99, with retail range $79.99-$136.56; target price of $79.99 verified as low-end retail price
Web search confirmed Bose QuietComfort 45 is real product; QC45 is the official model number used in documentation and retail listings
Task description explicitly requires unpublishing Bose product (status=0 unpublished); verifier.py uses this value to check product is unpublished
Web search and Bose press release confirm original Bose QuietComfort 45 MSRP was $329.95 at September 2021 launch. Metadata value of $329.00 is minor rounding (0.95 difference)

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims reference real, existing consumer electronics products. Sony WH-1000XM5 is a real noise-canceling headphone with MSRP $399 and model number WH-1000XM5. Logitech MX Master 3S is a real ergonomic mouse with standard price $99.99. Bose QuietComfort 45 is a real discontinued noise-canceling headphone with original MSRP $329.95 (metadata rounds to $329.00). Target prices ($329.99 for Sony, $79.99 for Logitech) are realistic based on 2026 market conditions. SKUs (SONY-WH1000XM5, LOGI-MXM3S, BOSE-QC45) are valid product identifiers matching actual product names and model numbers. The task requires updating prices in a Drupal Commerce environment and unpublishing the Bose product.
